Poke Bowl
Accompanied by your choice of either Salmon, Tuna, Spicy Tuna, Escolar, Yellowtail (+$1), Beef (+$1), Pork, Chicken, or Tofu. Any add-on for +$5.
Topping selections include avocado, radish, lettuce, carrot, seaweed salad, cucumber, mayo crab, and sushi rice with nitsume sauce or spicy mayo sauce.

﻿
(seaweed outside roll) your choice of Sushi, *Tuna,* *Salmon,* *Yellowtail w/wo Cucumber or Avocado*

In: Mayo Crab Meat, Avocado, Cucumber
New Crunchy Crab Roll
In: Tempura Crab, Tempura Flakes
Out: mayo crab meat, spicy mayo, Tempura flakes
New Crunch Shrimp Roll
In: Tempura Shrimp, Tempura flakes
Out: Steamed Shrimp, Spicy Mayo, Tempura Flakes

Out: Salmon, Spicy Mayo, Tempura Flakes

In: Eel, Avocado, Cucumber, Nitsume Sauce

Out: Nitsume Sauce

Out: Tuna, White Fish, Shrimp,
Nitsume Sauce, Wasabi Lime Aioli,
Scallion, Dried Seaweed,
Double Decker

Out: Crabmeat Salad, Shrimp,

In: Fried Shrimp, Cucumber
Out: Eel, Avocado, Nitsume Sauce

In: Tuna, Salmon, White Fish, Spicy Tempura Flake
Out: spicy mayo
Dynamite (Cooked)
In: Tempura Shrimp, Tempura Crab, Tempura Salmon, Mayo Crab
Out: Nitsume Sauce
*Las Vegas Roll

Out: Tuna, Salmon, White Fish, Avocado, Nitsume Sauce, Spicy Mayo, Wasabi Lime Aioli

Out: Crabmeat Salad, Shrimp,
Nitsume Sauce, Tempura Flake
One Volcano
In: Mayo Crab Meat, Avocado, Cucumber
Out: Volcano Sauce, Nitsume Sauce, Tempura Flake
*Picante Roll
In: Spicy White Fish, Cucumber
Out: Salmon, Avocado, White Fish, Ponzu, Scallion, Siracha
*Playboy Roll
In: Fried Shrimp, Cream Cheese
Out: Spicy Tuna, Avocado,
Nitsume Sauce, Tempura Flakes, Tobiko
*Rainbow Roll
In: Mayo Crab Meat, Avocado, Cucumber
Out: Tuna, Salmon, White Fish, Shrimp, Avocado
*Salmon Love
In: Fried Salmon, Avocado
Out: Crabmeat Salad, Salmon, Avocado, Nitsume Sauce
*Samurai Roll
In: Mayo Crab Meat, Avocado, Cucumber
Out: Crabmeat Salad, Chopped Salmon, Nitsume Sauce, Spicy Mayo, Tempura Flakes, Scallion, Masago
*SS14. Sex & the City
In: Spicy Tuna, Tempura Flakes
Out: Tuna, Mango, Avocado, Nitsume Sauce, Spicy Mayo
*SS16. Toro on Fire
In: Spicy Tuna, Cucumber, Tempura Flakes
Out: Torched Tuna, Ponzu, Spicy Mayo, Wasabi, Lime Aioli, Scallion, Sriracha
*SS17. Tuna on the moon
In: Spicy Tuna, Avocado
Out: Seared Tuna, Avocado, Nitsume Sauce, Tempura flake, scallion
SS18. Shrimp BBQ Beef
In: Tempura Shrimp, Cucumber
Out: BBQ Beef, Avocado, Nitsume sauce,
Washabi Aioli, Tempura flake, scallion

Out: Nitsume Sauce, Spicy Mayo, Scallion, Masago
